title: Ubiquiti UISP-R, UISP Router
description: Ideal for wireless ISP (WISP) deployments, the UISP Router is a fanless PoE router featuring (8) GbE RJ45 ports and (1) 1G SFP port for an additional fiber uplink option. The UISP Router provides a cost-effective routing solution for WISPs looking to quickly and inexpensively deliver Gigabit wireless speeds to their customers. With its hefty 110W total PoE supply , the UISP Router delivers substantial power to every radio in your service network. The UISP Router is managed ONLY with the UISP… (8) Gigabit LAN with 27V passive PoE that support 2-pair and 4-pair modes (1) 1Gb SFP port 110W PoE budget, max. 30W/port Fanless, thermal cooling for silent operation Wall-mountable (kit included) Easy, Bluetooth-powered setup via the UISP 1.4.0-beta.11 and higher Device Power cable Power adapter 27V / 4,4A Wallmount kit
